content.json:
# Lab 06 - Identity Detection Dashboard
This lightweight workbook is the deployable workbook used by the gated pipeline. The full analyst workbook remains under `workbooks/exports/identity_dashboard.json` as evidence.

content.title: Ingestion status (24h)

content.query:
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where ResultType != 0
| summarize FailedAttempts=count(), Users=dcount(UserPrincipalName) by IPAddress
| order by FailedAttempts desc
content.title: Failed sign-in burst candidates

content.query:
AuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where OperationName has_any ('role', 'member')
| project TimeGenerated, OperationName, Result, InitiatedBy, TargetResources
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Directory role change timeline

content.query:
AuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where OperationName has_any ('credential', 'secret', 'service principal', 'app consent')
| project TimeGenerated, OperationName, Result, InitiatedBy, TargetResources
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: App and service principal credential events
